overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves from under an elevated highway, across a busy intersection dominated by a large 'enjoy!' billboard, and into a darker tunnel area with vibrant holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway sidewalk with neon shops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing illuminated shop fronts on the left

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the multi-lane road to the right

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with support pillars running parallel to the sidewalk
colorful illuminated storefront signs with cyberpunk aesthetic
low concrete divider separating sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking beneath a massive elevated highway in a futuristic city at night. Neon-lit shop signs illuminate the left side while concrete barriers line the right. The wet pavement reflects the artificial lighting, and sparse traffic moves along the road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with large illuminated billboard

events.description: exits covered highway underpass into open intersection area
crossing the street at yellow crosswalk alongside other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing a major intersection, navigating through pedestrians while heading toward the large illuminated billboard

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction
futuristic sedan waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertisement sign with palm tree graphics and 'enjoy!' text
tall glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows towering in the background

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide urban intersection dominated by a massive glowing 'enjoy!' billboard with palm tree motifs. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk alongside other pedestrians while futuristic vehicles wait at the intersection. Tall skyscrapers with illuminated facades rise in the background, creating a dense cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under overpass with cyberpunk storefronts

events.description: enters covered sidewalk area after crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past futuristic shop fronts and holographic displays, moving deeper into the urban environment

entered.detail: futuristic storefronts with glowing cyan and purple neon signage including a sushi restaurant
large digital advertisements displaying animated content on building facades

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the camera moves along a sidewalk beneath another overpass section. Cyberpunk-style shop fronts with bright neon signs line the left side, while holographic billboards illuminate the right. The elevated highway structure now runs overhead, casting shadows on the wet pavement below.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underpass tunnel with colorful neon advertisements

events.description: enters darker tunnel area with purple and green neon lighting creating a moody atmosphere
movement speed increases while traversing the tunnel corridor

agents.ego_description: moving quickly through a dark neon-lit tunnel, passing holographic advertisements and vending machines

entered.detail: purple and cyan neon light strips running along the tunnel ceiling and walls
futuristic automated vending machines with glowing interfaces

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a dark, enclosed tunnel illuminated by vibrant purple and cyan neon lights. The environment shifts to a more confined space with concrete walls and futuristic vending machines. Holographic advertisements glow in the darkness as the camera accelerates through the underpass, creating a moody, cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched futuristic city, moving from the open scale of a highway underpass into the claustrophobic glow of a subterranean tunnel. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway where wet pavement reflects the artificial light of nearby shop signs and concrete barriers. As the camera moves forward, the space opens into a wide urban intersection dominated by a towering, glowing enjoy! billboard and a dense skyline of illuminated skyscrapers. The scene then shifts back under the shadow of an overpass, passing bright storefronts and holographic displays before turning toward a dark, enclosed underpass. Finally, the environment narrows into a tunnel of vibrant purple and cyan neon, where the camera accelerates past futuristic vending machines and glowing advertisements.
